news.title: I quit tech, bought 22 acres, and didn't look at my computer for years — until AI brought me back
news.snippet: Ryan Courtnage quit the tech company he cofounded and bought 22 acres of land in Creston, British Columbia.

news.title: What are Tech CEOs Saying About the Future of Work?
news.snippet: From Meta to OpenAI, tech leaders are cutting jobs at all levels to fund massive AI infrastructure investments while facing investor pressure.

news.title: OpenAI acquires tech talk show TBPN, marking entry into media industry

news.title: Why tech bros are so worried about AI having bad taste
news.snippet: As tech giants aura farm for sophistication, critics argue 'taste-washing' will lead AI brands to manufacture their own taste in due time.
